# Parity Matrix

| node.create | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | na | na | pending | na | rcl_bridge.c:101 crcl_node_create (rcl_node_init); RclClient.createNode:554; node creation works for N nodes — multi-node entity-binding tracked under node.multi |
| node.multi | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | na | na | pending | na | RclTransportSession.resolveNodeLocked binds each entity to nodes[nodeKey(name,ns)] (passed from ROS2Node.name/namespace), falling back to currentNode for nil; RclTransportSessionTests.testCreatePublisherBindsToNamedNodeNotLastRegistered |

Conduit uses CompressedImage |

| publish.serialized.non_bundled | supported | partial | minor | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | byte-seam-only | na | na | pending | pending | rcl_bridge.c:122-130 crcl_publisher_create rejects any type absent from crcl_marshal_registry.c, so route (a) (typed/serialized via rmw) cannot open a publisher; on that miss RclClient.createRawWriterPublisher falls back to route (b) — the CDDSBridge raw-CDR writer below rmw (sibling participant on the context domain, DDS topic/type via SwiftROS2Wire, USER_DATA typehash). Served outside rcl's entity graph (a documented divergence) but interoperable with any ROS 2 subscriber by topic + DDS-type name. Proven in-process by crcl-nonbundled-loopback (route-b .rcl publish -> .dds wire subscribe, same domain) and by RclNonbundledPublishIntegrationTests (LAN). Unblocks Conduit AudioData + CompressedPointCloud2 |
| subscribe.serialized.sensor_msgs/Imu | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | pass | na | pending | na | rcl_subscription.c rcl_take_serialized_message -> (Data,UInt64) seam; Imu bundled in registry; Node.swift:110 CDRDecoder decode is identical across backends |
| subscribe.serialized.sensor_msgs/Image | supported | missing | minor | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | byte-seam-only | na | na | na | na | raw Image not bundled; rcl_subscription.c:102-108 crcl_subscription_create is registry-gated -> 'unsupported type' for raw Image |
| subscribe.serialized.sensor_msgs/PointCloud2 | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | pass | na | pending | na | PointCloud2 bundled in registry; rcl_subscription.c serialized take + Node.swift CDRDecoder |
| subscribe.serialized.non_bundled | supported | partial | minor | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | byte-seam-only | na | na | pending | na | RclClient.createSubscription falls back to a CDDSBridge raw-CDR reader on a registry miss (mirror of the publish route-b): a sibling participant on the context domain, DDS topic/type via SwiftROS2Wire + USER_DATA typehash; received below rmw (outside rcl's wait-set, a documented divergence) but interoperable with any ROS 2 publisher by topic + DDS-type name. Proven in-process by crcl-nonbundled-sub-loopback (.dds wire publish -> .rcl route-b subscribe, same domain) and by RclNonbundledSubscribeIntegrationTests (LAN). Pairs with publish.serialized.non_bundled for full non-bundled pub/sub. |
| service.server | supported | partial | minor | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | na | na | pending | na | rcl_service.c crcl_service_create gated on crcl_srv_registry_lookup (12 bundled srv types, crcl_srv_registry.c); no byte-seam fallback for services. Wire path serves any ROS2ServiceType Non-bundled (arbitrary-type) services deferred-by-decision — no consumer (Conduit is a publisher); the pure-Swift wire path serves any ROS2ServiceType; a route-b raw-CDR fallback would require request/response GUID correlation for no current need (design 2026-06-13 §9 non-goal). Bundled types fully supported. |
| service.client | supported | partial | minor | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | na | na | pending | na | rcl_client.c:135-143 crcl_client_create gated on the 12-entry srv registry; ROS2Client is generic over any service on the wire path Non-bundled (arbitrary-type) services deferred-by-decision — no consumer (Conduit is a publisher); the pure-Swift wire path serves any ROS2ServiceType; a route-b raw-CDR fallback would require request/response GUID correlation for no current need (design 2026-06-13 §9 non-goal). Bundled types fully supported. |
| param.declare | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | na | na | pending | na | backend-agnostic ParameterStore actor; declareParameter identical across backends |
| param.getset | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | na | na | pending | na | ParameterStore get/set is backend-agnostic; served via bundled rcl_interfaces param services (crcl_srv_registry.c) on RCL |
| param.event | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | na | na | pending | na | /parameter_events via installParameterEventEmitter + lazy ParameterEvent publisher (rcl_interfaces/msg/ParameterEvent bundled in crcl_marshal_registry.c) |
| action.server | supported | partial | minor | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | na | na | pending | na | rcl_action_server.c:212-220 crcl_action_server_create gated on crcl_action_registry_lookup; registry holds 1 entry (example_interfaces/action/Fibonacci). Wire path serves any action Non-bundled (arbitrary-type) actions deferred-by-decision — no consumer (Conduit is a publisher); the pure-Swift wire path serves any action; a route-b fallback would require the full goal state machine (3 services + 2 topics) for no current need (design 2026-06-13 §9 non-goal). Bundled types (Fibonacci) fully supported. |
| action.client | supported | partial | minor | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | na | na | pending | na | rcl_action_client.c crcl_action_client_create gated on crcl_action_registry (CRCL_ACTION_REGISTRY_ENTRY_COUNT 1, Fibonacci only) Non-bundled (arbitrary-type) actions deferred-by-decision — no consumer (Conduit is a publisher); the pure-Swift wire path serves any action; a route-b fallback would require the full goal state machine (3 services + 2 topics) for no current need (design 2026-06-13 §9 non-goal). Bundled types (Fibonacci) fully supported. |
| qos.profiles | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | na | na | pending | na | makeCrclQoS maps reliability/durability/history/depth -> rmw_qos_profile; same knob set as pure-Swift TransportQoS (deadline/lifespan/liveliness absent on both = parity) |
| transport.dds | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | na | na | pending | na | RclTransportSession.open forwards ddsUnicastPeers (bare host) + ddsNetworkInterface; RclClient.makeDiscoveryURIXML builds the SAME CycloneDDS discovery XML as the wire DDS path via the shared dds_bridge_build_domain_config_xml, exported as CYCLONEDDS_URI around context creation (restored on teardown). .rclUnicast factory + validate() peer check close the config hole. RclDiscoveryEnvTests asserts the XML shape; RclUnicastIntegrationTests is the LAN proof |
| transport.zenoh | supported | partial | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | na | na | na | na | RCL-over-Zenoh only via build-time SWIFT_ROS2_RCL_RMW=zenoh variant (CRos2JazzyZenoh, #128); TransportConfig.rcl takes no zenoh selector and the .zenoh API arm never routes through RCL (dropZenohWire carves out zenoh-pico) |
